nodes.title: Connect this loader to the LoRA to use GGUF instead of fp8
Model download links
widgets_values:
Recommended LoRA for realistic output. Swap or disable this to explore other styles (e.g., anime, 3D, illustration).

Lenovo.safetensors:

[https://civitai.com/models/1662740?modelVersionId=2066914](https://civitai.com/models/1662740?modelVersionId=2066914)

📁 ComfyUI/models/loras

nodes.title: Model download links
widgets_values:
Download either the fp8 or the gguf version of the model. If you have limited VRAM, gguf is recommended.

The Q5 version is a good middleground between size and quality.

nodes.title: Tip!
widgets_values:
SageAttention is recommended for this workflow to speed up generation times significantly. We created an easy installer:

[hhttps://github.com/mickmumpitz/ComfyUI-Sage-EasyInstall](https://github.com/mickmumpitz/ComfyUI-Sage-EasyInstall)

Download latest release [here](https://github.com/mickmumpitz/ComfyUI-Sage-EasyInstall/releases/latest/download/ComfyUI-Sage-EasyInstall.zip).

- mode = Controls start image behavior. All images are always used as reference.
    - Start + Reference: First image also used as start image.
    - Reference: No start image.
    - Auto: Enables start image with 1 image, disables with more than 1.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Negative Prompt)
widgets_values: 过曝，静态，细节模糊不清，字幕，风格，作品，画作，画面，静止，整体发灰，最差质量，低质量，JPEG压缩残留，丑陋的，残缺的，多余的手指，画得不好的手部，画得不好的脸部，畸形的，毁容的，形态畸形的肢体，手指融合，静止不动的画面，杂乱的背景，三条腿，背景人很多，倒着走,

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: A watercolor-painted person in a watercolor world. They emerge onto a stone path leading to a grand castle with towers atop rocky cliffs, surrounded by lush painted hills of wildflowers, giant mushrooms, and a cozy timber cottage. A rainbow stretches over a calm blue lake. The person stops in wonder. Camera slowly pulls back revealing the full storybook kingdom. Warm watercolor painting style, visible brushstrokes, ink outlines, soft paper texture,
